text: ViT (Dosovitskiy et al. 2021, Google) showed that a pure Transformer applied directly to sequences of image patches can outperform CNNs on image classification when pretrained on sufficient data (JFT-300M).

Swin Transformer (Liu et al. 2021, Microsoft, ICCV 2021 Best Paper) uses shifted window attention to build hierarchical feature maps with linear complexity, enabling ViTs as general-purpose vision backbones.

DINOv2 (Oquab et al. 2023, Meta AI) produces high-quality visual features through self-supervised pretraining, achieving strong performance across image classification, segmentation, and depth estimation without fine-tuning.
